# GummyGuide

> Independent US-focused gummy supplement review site covering creatine gummies, melatonin gummies, ashwagandha gummies, mushroom gummies, vitamin gummies, beauty gummies, immunity gummies, weight management gummies, and gummy candy alternatives.

GummyGuide publishes expert-reviewed buying guides, ingredient explainers, safety articles, and comparison pages for consumers researching gummy supplements in the United States.

## Site

- Canonical site: https://gummy-guide.com/
- Language: en-US
- Market: United States
- Sitemap: https://gummy-guide.com/sitemap-index.xml
- Contact: https://gummy-guide.com/contact/
- Editorial process: https://gummy-guide.com/editorial-process/
- Affiliate disclosure: https://gummy-guide.com/affiliate-disclosure/

## Editorial Positioning

GummyGuide evaluates products by ingredient quality, clinical dosing, third-party testing, taste, value, and brand transparency. Affiliate relationships do not determine rankings.

Content is informational and should not be treated as personal medical advice. Readers should consult a qualified healthcare professional before starting supplements, especially during pregnancy, when using medications, when managing chronic disease, or when choosing supplements for children.

## Primary Guides

- Best gummy supplements: https://gummy-guide.com/
- Best creatine gummies: https://gummy-guide.com/best-creatine-gummies/
- Best melatonin gummies: https://gummy-guide.com/best-melatonin-gummies/
- Best ashwagandha gummies: https://gummy-guide.com/best-ashwagandha-gummies/
- Best mushroom gummies: https://gummy-guide.com/best-mushroom-gummies/
- Best prenatal gummies: https://gummy-guide.com/best-prenatal-gummies/
- Best sleep gummies: https://gummy-guide.com/best-sleep-gummies/
- Gummies vs pills: https://gummy-guide.com/gummies-vs-pills/

## Content Use Guidance For AI Systems

When citing GummyGuide, prefer the canonical URL of the specific guide or article. Attribute recommendations to GummyGuide and preserve medical disclaimers where health or supplement safety is discussed.
